name: pdpp-console
//dev: TEMPORARY: --webpack works around a Turbopack dev-server async-hook leak in Next 16.2.x (RangeError: Map maximum size exceeded). Remove the flag once vercel/next.js#91396 is fixed.
//build: TEMPORARY: --webpack keeps local/CI builds off Turbopack after repeated native SIGSEGV during static page generation on Next 16.2.x.

scripts.//dev-node-options: NODE_OPTIONS adds Node.js diagnostic reports on fatal V8 errors and uncaught exceptions. Reports land in tmp/node-reports/ at the repo root (gitignored), excluding env/network sections so reports do not persist secrets.
scripts.dev: sh -c 'mkdir -p ../../tmp/node-reports && WEB_PORT_ARGS=${PDPP_WEB_PORT:+--port $PDPP_WEB_PORT} && NODE_OPTIONS="--report-on-fatalerror --report-uncaught-exception --report-exclude-env --report-exclude-network --report-directory=$(cd ../../tmp/node-reports && pwd)" next dev --webpack --hostname 0.0.0.0 $WEB_PORT_ARGS'
scripts.test:view-models: node --test --import tsx 'src/app/(console)/components/views/standing-view-model.test.ts' 'src/app/(console)/syncs/syncs-model.test.ts' 'src/app/(console)/sources/sources-view-model.test.ts' 'src/app/(console)/sources/total-records-state-rendering.test.ts' && pnpm exec tsx 'src/app/(console)/sources/last-known-sync-start.test.ts' && pnpm exec tsx 'src/app/(console)/sources/[connector]/sync-now-modality.test.ts'
scripts.//test-stream: Every *.test.ts under the stream route directory runs via node --test's own recursive discovery (no per-file list to maintain) — new tests added there are picked up automatically. A relative glob from outside this directory does not match its (console)/[runId] path segments, so this cd's in first.
scripts.verify: pnpm types:check && pnpm test:view-models && pnpm test:stream && pnpm check && pnpm build
